title: cornus peruviana
intro: Cornus peruviana, also known as Mountain Ash or Peruvian Cornel, is a shrub or small tree native to the Andes mountains of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cornus peruviana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Cornus peruviana often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
